guides.title: 🛠️ Swiss Equipment & Material Markup Guidelines
guides.summary: Best practices for sourcing materials, applying markup, and complying with Swiss eco disposal regulations:
actionPoints: 📦 **Material Markup Standard**: Standard Swiss trade practice permits a 10% to 20% markup on wholesale materials to cover handling & logistics.
🌱 **Minergie & Eco Standards**: Using Swiss-certified eco materials increases proposal win rate by 18% in Canton Zurich & Geneva.
♻️ **Waste Disposal Billing**: Always list disposal fees (VRG / VeVA fees) as a separate line item on client estimates.
